name: Miya Hillmick
alt_names: ミーヤ・I・ヒルミック
description: Miya makes her appearance in Code Geass R2 episode 12. She first finds Lelouch in the library during Milly's event "Cupid's Day", and claims him as her own.    ~!Unfortunately she is geassed, and is later seen in Ougi and Viletta's wedding photo in the final episode.!~
